feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAPUI5 Table with navigation to details on same view
entry.content:
Hello together,

I have a simple view on which I want to display a table with claims (see XML Code).
Below that I want to display details when the user clicks on a row.
Is this possible?
We are using oData V4 so it is not possible to use the read method of the model in Java Script controller...

<mvc:View id="zXML" controllerName="test.ext.main.Claims" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc" xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:l="sap.ui.layout">
	<Table id="xmlTable" inset="false" items="{ToClaims}">
		<columns>
			<Column>
				<Text text="Claim"/>
			</Column>
			<Column>
				<Text text="ClaimPos"/>
			</Column>
		</columns>
		<items>
			<ColumnListItem type="Navigation" press="onItemPress">
				<cells>
					<Text text="{Claim}"/>
					<Text text="{ClaimPos}"/>
				</cells>
			</ColumnListItem>
		</items>
	</Table>
	<!-- Hidden Container - will be displaye weh onItemPress -->
	<VBox id="AdditionalData" visible="false">
		<Title text="Details"/>
		<VBox>
			<HBox>
				<Label text="Claim"/>
				<!--Input value="{Claim}" editable="false" /-->
			</HBox>
			<HBox>
				<Label text="ClaimPos"/>
				<!--Input value="{ClaimPos}" editable="false" /-->
			</HBox>
		</VBox>
	</VBox>
</mvc:View>

entry.title: Disable "show value" (autocomplete) at input fields of Fiori Apps
entry.content:
Hi Expert 

I would like to disable the "Show Value" function that occurs in fiori apps.
If there is a simple setting that allows me to disable it, please let me know how to do it.
(not a developer level setting, but a cnfiguration and parameter setting level setting method)

By "Show value" I am referring to the list of field values ​​that are automatically displayed when I enter one or more characters in a specific field. For example, if I enter "T" in the BP code field, a list of BPs starting with T will be displayed. Please see the screenshot.
I don't know what to call this function, so I've decided to call it show value for the time being.

BR
Takashi

entry.title: How to create outbound delivery during BD3/BDK (Third party sales process) in SAP public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi team,

Currently, based on our company's business needs, we are considering using the BD3 or BDK process for scenarios where third-party vendors directly ship goods to customers. In the standard BD3 or BDK process, creating an outbound delivery is not involved, as the goods are shipped directly from the vendor. However, from the company's perspective, we still need to create delivery documents.

Are there any other steps or settings we can adjust to generate these delivery documents? Would it be feasible to add a delivery note step to this process?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: Workzone - is it possible to merge content from different channels?
entry.content:
Hello,

I don't think this is possible but maybe I missed something on the documentation. Say you have a workzone instance (standard) with multiple channels configured (e.g. S/4 HANA and business solutions), and they contribute pages with the same names. Is it possible to merge them instead of having a duplication of tabs with the same name ?

 

Thanks in advance

 

@Vera_Gutbrod @ThomasReiss

entry.title: How to increase the invoice approve number list in SAP FIORI?
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to increase the invoice number list in SAP Fiori but I cannot find out how to do that.

For example, if I have 50 vendor invoices to approve, in Fiori I`m able to see only the first 20.

I could see all the vendor list invoices that needs to be approved in SAP, but in Fiori I could see at most 20 of them.

How to increase the vendor invoice number list in Fiori?

Thank you very much!

entry.title: How to deactivate the DRAFT mode for associations of a root entity in Fiori Elements?
entry.content:
I have a root entity in our CAP service, for which I have created a projection in the CAP service and have also activated draft mode there.

Then I created a list and object page in our Fiori Elements app. Everything works quite well so far.

Now I add an association to the entity, which is to be displayed as a table in the object page. This also works. However, this association is now also activated in draft mode. However, this should not be the case, as we are working with final transaction data here and only want to display it.

I have already played around with various annotations, but unfortunately I cannot get this association into read-only mode.

Is there a possibility that you know of? Thank you 🙂

 

service ProcessorService {
    
    @odata.draft.enabled
    entity Cards as
        projection on my.Cards {
            *
        }
}

// db schema
entity Cards : managed {
  key ID               : String; 
      transactions     : Association to many transactions
                           on transactions.card = $self;
  // ... etc
}

entry.title: How add list of app navigations to column field.
entry.content:
For example, the Manage Sales Contracts app has:

I'm currently using this in my app for navigation:

<Record Type="UI.DataFieldWithIntentBasedNavigation">
    <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Sales Document"/>
    <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="SalesDocument"/>
    <PropertyValue Property="SemanticObject" String="AccountingDocument"/>
    <PropertyValue Property="Action" String="flowDisplay"/>
</Record>
But this only allows for one link, and everything I've found in the documentation for "Navigation from an App (Outbound Navigation)" , does not seem to work (or at least I did not implement it properly). Could anyone give an example of how I would do this with for example this field, the semantic object/action above and this semantic object and action pair: SalesContract, change. Please let me know if you need any more details. Thank you!

entry.title: InteractiveDonutChart doesn't show less than 3 segments
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm working in a fiori elements application, using an odata v4 service, then I needed to implement an InteractiveDonutChart (sap.suite.ui.microchart.InteractiveDonutChart) in a custom section using as segments an association from the current data definition.

I replaced my code by fixed values (as done in the example provided by sap in the url https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/entity/sap.suite.ui.microchart.InteractiveDonutChart/sample/sap.suite.ui.microchart.sample.InteractiveDonutChart). 

It works correctly when I have 3 or more segments, but it stops working with less segments.

3 segments:

2 segments:

 

I didn't find any SAP notes or additional info in SAP forums. Most cases in the application I'm working on will have more than 3 segments, however it's expected the chart keeps working when it's not the case. 

I would appreciate if someone could give me some idea.

Regards,

Rogerio

entry.title: Passing Filters to non custom control field in smart filter bar
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

<smartfilterbar:SmartFilterBar id="smartFilterBar" showFilterConfiguration="true" entitySet="EntitySet" enableBasicSearch="true"
liveMode="false" search="GoSearch" useToolbar="fasle" showClearButton="false" useDateRangeType="true" persistencyKey="FilterBar"
visible="true" smartVariant="SVM01" beforeVariantFetch="onBeforeVariantFetch" afterVariantLoad="onAfterVariantLoad"
filterChange="onFilterChange">
<smartfilterbar:controlConfiguration>
<smartfilterbar:ControlConfiguration key="Field1" label="label1" groupId="_BASIC" visibleInAdvancedArea="true"
displayBehaviour="idAndDescription" visible="true" index="1" mandatory="mandatory"/>
<smartfilterbar:ControlConfiguration key="Field2" label="label2" groupId="_BASIC" visibleInAdvancedArea="true"
displayBehaviour="idAndDescription" visible="true" index="1" mandatory="mandatory"/>
</smartfilterbar:controlConfiguration>
<smartfilterbar:layoutData>
<FlexItemData shrinkFactor="0"/>
</smartfilterbar:layoutData>
</smartfilterbar:SmartFilterBar>

i have two fields, field 1 & field 2 in my entityset as shown above. once the value is selected for field 1 is it possible to pass the selected value to field2. this can be achieved by custom control. i dont want that. is there any way to achieve this functionality?

Thanks,
Gowtham

entry.title: Issue with Cross-Navigation in SAP Fiori List Report
entry.content:
Course 

Hi everyone,

I've developed a SAP List Report using the SAP Fiori List Report template and implemented cross-navigation to a target app. The target app is a standard Fiori app called "Record Inspection Results."

To enable navigation, I used annotations in the CDS view and configured a tile in the SAP Fiori Launchpad. I also added the parameter "InspectionLot", which is passed during navigation.

The navigation works correctly the first time I click on an InspectionLot—it opens the target app with the correct parameter. However, when I go back to the list report and click on a different InspectionLot, the navigation still opens with the previous InspectionLot value instead of the new one.

The only way to reset this behavior is by refreshing the browser on the list report page.

Has anyone encountered this issue before? Is there a way to force the navigation parameter to update properly without requiring a manual refresh?

Any help or alternative solutions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Fiori iFrame Preview Filename shows are $Value
entry.content:
Hi,

I have written a Fiori application that displays a pdf statement using an iFrame. When the pdf previews, the file name shows as $value? I am using the GET_STREAM method passing the header value but it still shows as $value. How do I get the file name to show?

Kind Regards

Deon

      ls_header-name = 'Content-Disposition'.
      ls_header-value = 'inline; filename="BuyingCardStatement.pdf";'.
      set_header( is_header = ls_header ).

      ls_stream-mime_type = 'application/pdf'.
      ls_stream-value = lv_pdf_xstring.
      copy_data_to_ref( EXPORTING is_data = ls_stream
                        CHANGING  cr_data = er_stream ).

entry.title: Web Client Extension tutorial
entry.content:
I'm new to developing in sap, I'm trying to learn from the “How to Develop Web Client Extensions” pdf book and I try to follow the steps it gave but the version of the tutorial is fiori 1.15.1 and the version I downloaded is fiori 1.16.3. I'm learning until 3.1.5.1 Creating a Service Calls Fiori App, I have no idea how to change the format and data because the tutorial tell me to change the file code but I not even see the file. Can anyone help me?

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_WEB_CLIENT/e6ac71d18c7543828bd4463f77d67ff7/03f237d302334ba3bd3967ae1034c8d1.html

This is the docs that i use (worker gave me the pdf but I'm also looking it in the web)

entry.title: Syntax error in program SAPLWR11
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm facing with this syntax errror in program SAPLWR11. This occurs when we try to run transaction XD02 and clicking save. I'm not sure which SAP note to implement to overcome this error. Any advice on how to solve this would be helpful! Thank you.

 

Regards,

Susan

entry.title: Purchase Requisition Item Fiori App Enhancement without using SAP BAS
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I would like to seek advice and guidance on whether if this enhancement is workable without SAP BAS.

The requirement is to add a customize field under "Valuation" called "Discount Amount" or "Discount %", and the user will enter the amount or % in that customize field and the "Valuation Price" as highlighted in the screenshot below will auto deduct from the amount entered (which means there will be some calculation logic). For example, if user enters 20 at the new customized field "Discount Amount", the valuation price will change to 180 instead of 200.

Any inputs are highly appreciated! Thank you so much!

Regards,
Sher Lynn

entry.title: how to set the Go button on the bottom of the smartfilterbar?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can someone help how to keep the Go button on the bottom of the toolbar ? currently its coming like this 

And i want something like this 

I tried to change the properties of smartfilter bar like this useToolbar="false"  showGoOnFB="true" and its coming next to the filter not the bottom 

 

Please suggest where i am doing mistake.

entry.title: Issue with Cross App Navigation post FIORI FS Upgrade & SAPUI5 upgrade
entry.content:
Hi,

From the time we have upgrade to FS Server 2022 & SAPUI5 from 1.60.18 to 1.120.0 we are facing issues with cross-app navigation. sap-iapp-state & sap-iapp--history seems to be causing the problem.

In the app we are navigating from X app to Y app (object Page) that is built on FIORI Elements. This works fine on 1.60 SApUI5 version but not on upgraded 1.120.0 version.

Not sure if this is SAPUI5 upgrade issue or FS server 2022 upgrade issue but looks like the app state is not getting restored (so could be an issue with sap-iapp-state & sap-iapp--history but not sure)

Any lead on what the issue and what could be tried as part of resolution could be very helpful. Please let me know if any more details are required.

entry.title: Why is FIORI Elements application is not restoring the state on page refresh
entry.content:
Hi,

I am having issues restoring the application state on refresh. And below is what SAP says. May I know what exactly this means and where I need to make this setting ?

  • Refreshing the browser doesn't restore the iAppState if SAP Fiori launchpad isn't configured to persist it in the back end.

entry.title: How to disable sap-iapp-state--history
entry.content:
Hi,

May I know if there is a way to disable sap-iapp-state--history as this seems to have impacting loading of FIORI Elements applications on refresh.

entry.title: Need visibility into determination of KF Codes present in Asset Balances report (F1617)
entry.content:
We have certain asset-related GL accounts that we've added to the chart of accounts, and thus which aren't present in the Asset Balances report (Link to Fiori app library page ). This report utilizes certain Key Figure codes to show column breakouts of depreciation, acquisition, etc., each of which appear to align with mutually exclusive GL accounts, with Net Book Value being a grouping of all GL accounts.

In tracing the CDS view used by this report (C_ASSETBALANCE within FINS_FIS_AA_APPS), I'm having a difficult time finding exactly what table(s) or other items are used to define the KF Codes presented in this report. Can someone point me in the right direction for seeing how the KF codes are defined? As an example, KF code 000014-0010790401 is NBV at reporting Date (see below). Ideally, I'd like to explore adding certain GL accounts to be included in these KF codes. Note that I'm relatively new to a technical role, so apologies if there's an obvious T-code I'm missing.

Thank you

entry.title: SAP Fiori catalog not loading
entry.content:
Hello!

When I log into Fiori, no application is loaded.

 

When I press F12, the console shows me the following error:

Thanks for all the help!
